releases.note: DocsCI enabled. First run caught 28 issues before merge.
Latest release. Support ticket data pending.

sample_findings.error: ImportError: No module named 'acme_sdk.v2.auth'. Module was renamed to 'acme_sdk.auth' in v3.0.0.

sample_findings.issue: Parameter 'currency_code' documented as optional but marked required in OpenAPI spec v3.0.0
sample_findings.suggested_fix: | currency_code | string | Yes | ISO 4217 currency code |

sample_findings.issue: Response field 'metadata' not documented. Added in v3.0.0.
sample_findings.suggested_fix: Add '| metadata | object | No | Arbitrary key-value metadata attached to the user. |' to response table.

sample_findings.issue: Heading jumps from H2 to H4 (skips H3).
sample_findings.suggested_fix: Change '#### Retry logic' to '### Retry logic'

sample_findings.error: TypeError: client.batch is not a function. Method removed in v3.0.0, replaced by client.operations.batch()
sample_findings.note: Fix requires more context — sent to docs team for review.

methodology.simulation_basis: Run DocsCI against 8 historical release tags of a representative open-source SDK documentation repository. Pre-DocsCI releases (v2.x) analyzed retrospectively with DocsCI in read-only audit mode to count failures that were present at release time. Post-DocsCI releases (v3.x) reflect actual gated runs where findings must be resolved before merge.
methodology.support_ticket_methodology: Support ticket count derived from docs-tagged GitHub issues opened within 30 days after each release. Tickets flagged as 'broken example' or 'wrong parameter' by triage label.
methodology.cost_model: Each support ticket estimated at $150 in developer + support time (15 min developer + 45 min support + $30 tooling overhead). Source: internal survey of 12 API-first companies.
